EXECUTIVE_SUMMARY.notes: iPOS stock perfectly matches TITAN for iPOS-sourced products. Test data excluded from comparison.

STEP_1_DATA_COUNTS.explanation: 3 extra records in TITAN are test data products

ROOT_CAUSE.actual_cause: Reconciliation was comparing ALL TITAN stock (including test data) against iPOS
ROOT_CAUSE.resolution: Updated reconciliation to compare only iPOS-sourced products
ROOT_CAUSE.test_data_impact: 20,752,020 units from test products correctly excluded

STOCK_BREAKDOWN_BY_WAREHOUSE.note: Top warehouses by stock quantity from iPOS

RECOMMENDATIONS: Stock reconciliation should always filter by source_system for accurate comparison
Test data should be clearly marked or in separate tenant
Consider adding source_system column to product_stocks for faster filtering
